DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-23-2011 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HAHN'S HIBACHI, INC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Elizabeth A. MacDonald (922.5939) for plaintiff and opposing party; Jaime Raba (530.400.3131) for defendant and moving party.
This matter was not argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must set forth specific date(s) of the alleged breach. Order signed in open court. Plaintiff to file its second amended complaint by September 12, 2011. (302/LMG) Judge Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153
